mapper.insert: insert into compile_job_steps ( job_id, step_execution_id, step_name, agent_role, model_route, sequence_no, status, summary, input_summary, output_summary, error_message, started_at, finished_at ) values ( #{record.jobId}, #{record.stepExecutionId}, #{record.stepName}, #{record.agentRole}, #{record.modelRoute}, #{record.sequenceNo}, #{record.status}, #{record.summary}, #{record.inputSummary}, #{record.outputSummary}, #{record.errorMessage}, #{record.startedAt}, #{record.finishedAt} )
mapper.select: select job_id, step_execution_id, step_name, agent_role, model_route, sequence_no, status, summary, input_summary, output_summary, error_message, started_at, finished_at from compile_job_steps where job_id = #{jobId} order by sequence_no asc
